title: Anoryx Ecosystem Event Envelope
description: The canonical cross-product wrapper (O-002, ADR-0002) around a locked Sentinel F-002 event. The `payload` member is the whole events.schema.json oneOf, referenced by $ref and validating UNMODIFIED — the envelope never copies or widens the locked schema. The envelope adds the bus-level fields the cross-product event bus needs: identity (envelope_id), ordering (sequence), idempotency (idempotency_key), correlation (correlation_id/causation_id), provenance (source_product), and schema version (schema_version). VALIDATOR DIALECT: Sentinel, Anoryx-AI-Orchestrator, and Delta MUST validate envelopes with a JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 validator (same dialect as the wrapped payload) so no parser-differential exists. The object is closed (additionalProperties:false) and every field is bounded (maxLength/maximum) per the F-001 audit posture: closed schemas remove a silent smuggling channel and bounded fields remove a DoS-via-inspection vector. HONESTY BOUNDARIES (ADR-0002, non-removable): (a) replay and DLQ are SPECIFIED, not implemented — O-003 builds the machinery; (b) delivery is at-least-once, consumers MUST dedupe on idempotency_key; (c) unknown schema_version handling is reject-to-DLQ. THREE CONTRACT INVARIANTS that JSON Schema cannot express across sibling values and that a consumer (O-003) MUST enforce fail-closed: event_type MUST equal payload.event_type (payload authoritative); idempotency_key MUST equal payload.event_id for events (the F-002 bus dedup key); source_product MUST equal the mTLS-authenticated peer identity (never trusted from the body, rule 7). Disagreement on any of the three is rejected (to DLQ).

schema_version.description: Envelope schema major version. A v1 consumer accepts 1. An unrecognized value still STRUCTURALLY validates (so a well-formed but unknown-version envelope is ROUTED to the DLQ, not rejected with a 422) — the reject-to-DLQ disposition (honesty boundary c) is a documented consumer obligation (O-003), not a schema constraint. Pinning this with a const would make reject-to-DLQ unreachable and untestable. Bounded to cap inspection cost.

envelope_id.description: Unique identifier of THIS envelope (UUID v4). Distinct from payload.event_id — the envelope and the event it carries have separate identities.

event_type.description: Routing / DLQ-triage hint surfaced at the envelope level so a router or a dead-lettered entry is classifiable WITHOUT deserializing the large oneOf payload. MUST equal payload.event_type; the payload is authoritative; a consumer rejects-to-DLQ on disagreement. Charset restricted to a lowercase underscore slug (forbids control characters and whitespace; log-injection defense). Mirrors the event_type const shape in events.schema.json.

source_product.description: The emitting ecosystem product. Its TRUSTED value is established by the RECEIVER from the mTLS-authenticated peer identity; the body value MUST be verified against the peer and is NEVER trusted from the body (rule 7). Disagreement is rejected. Closed enum = the four Anoryx ecosystem products; for the event-ingest seam the authenticated peer is Sentinel.

occurred_at.description: Envelope emission time (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 date-time, UTC). Distinct from payload.event_timestamp, which is the time of the underlying domain event.

idempotency_key.description: Consumer deduplication key. Delivery is at-least-once (honesty boundary b): consumers MUST dedupe on this value. For Sentinel events it MUST equal the server-resolved payload.event_id (F-002's designated bus dedup key). Forging it to a previously-seen value would cause a consumer to drop (suppress) a new event — defended by binding to the server-resolved event_id plus the ingest HMAC tamper-evidence (ADR-0002 threat 5). Charset restricted to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

sequence.description: Monotonic, strictly increasing per-source_product emission sequence number. Bounded replay (POST /v1/bus/replays, from_sequence) uses it as an inclusive lower bound. Bounded to the JS-safe integer ceiling to cap inspection cost.

correlation_id.description: Groups all envelopes belonging to one causal chain. Defaults to the originating payload.request_id. Charset restricted to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

causation_id.description: OPTIONAL envelope_id of the direct predecessor that caused this envelope. Absent at the root of a causal chain. Charset restricted to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

payload.description: The wrapped Sentinel event. References the LOCKED Anoryx-Sentinel/contracts/events.schema.json ($id sentinel:events:v1, oneOf over all variants) by $ref; the payload validates against it UNMODIFIED. This contract REFERENCES — it never redefines, copies, or widens — the locked schema. Same relative path the O-001 openapi.yaml already uses.
